title: 21st Birthday Decorations for Men - Blue and Gold Banner, Balloons, Navy and Gold Latex, Confetti Party Supplies
features: 21st Birthday Decorations: You will get a navy blue triangle flag banner, gold happy 21st birthday banner, 32inch 21 foil balloon, cake topper, 5 pcs navy blue balloons, 5 pcs confetti balloons, 5 pcs gold balloons and ribbons.

Happy 21st Birthday banner: The length of the birthday banner is about 1.5m, and each string banner has 11 pcs triangular flags (15cm*21cm）. The Bunting banner is suitable for 21st birthdays, or anniversary parties.

High-Quality Material: The triangle banners are made of paper material, navy blue, and gold glitter design. The 21-year-old balloon is made of aluminum film, it is recommended to inflate to 85%. The balloon uses high-quality latex that is non-toxic and odorless.

Easy to Assemble: The party balloons support helium or air. The triangle flag needs to be strung together by yourself. And then you can hang these banners on walls, doors, balconies, and windows to decorate your party.

Blue Gold Party Decorations: 21st birthday banner's unique design makes your party more attractive, and suitable for indoor and outdoor, adding atmosphere to your birthday, and letting you and your guests have deep memories.

specifications_table.Included Components: Birthday Bunting, Gold Birthday Banner, 32 Inch Birthday Balloon, Cake Topper, 12 Inch Blue Balloons, 12 Inch Gold Balloons, 12 Inch Confetti Balloons, and Ribbon
